mapper.select: SELECT ID, USER_NAME, USER_BIRTHDAY, USER_EMAIL, USER_PHONE, USER_EXP, USER_LEVEL, USER_THUMBNAIL_NAME, USER_THUMBNAIL_URL, USER_NICKNAME, USER_PASSWORD FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_NICKNAME LIKE '%'||#{query}||'%'

SELECT ID, QUIZ_TITLE, QUIZ_DESCRIPTION, QUIZ_CATEGORY, QUIZ_EXPECTATION, QUIZ_EXP, QUIZ_DIFFICULT, QUIZ_LANGUAGE FROM TBL_QUIZ WHERE QUIZ_TITLE LIKE '%'||#{query}||'%' OR QUIZ_DESCRIPTION LIKE '%'||#{query}||'%' OR QUIZ_CATEGORY LIKE '%'||#{query}||'%' OR QUIZ_EXPECTATION LIKE '%'||#{query}||'%' OR QUIZ_DIFFICULT LIKE '%'||#{query}||'%' OR QUIZ_LANGUAGE LIKE '%'||#{query}||'%'
